evals.prompt: Run /skill-craft on P:/.claude/skills/skill-craft — the skill-craft skill should diagnose, plan, execute, evaluate fidelity, and gate itself.
evals.expected_output: fidelity gating evaluating diagnosing planning executing

evals.prompt: Run /skill-craft on a non-existent path P:/tmp/nonexistent-skill-xyz — should handle gracefully without crashing.
Run /skill-craft on P:/.claude/skills/gto — a different skill. Expected: lifecycle completes, cert_gate validates, findings are routed.

Run /skill-craft on P:/packages/cc-skills-meta/skills/skill-craft — the skill-craft skill should diagnose, plan, execute, evaluate its own fidelity, and gate itself. The /skill-craft trigger appears in this prompt.
/skill-craft review /skill-craft for gaps and opportunities — self-review with explicit trigger
